about.description: About information. You can add whatever you want next to the author name and the description of the effect

input_facedetection.description: DEPRECATED Old way of using the face detection parameter in the effect. Use `param_face_detection` instead

input_time.description: DEPRECATED Old way of using a time parameter in the effect. Use `param_time` instead

label.description: Name of the effect as shown in the OBS UI

metafileVersion.description: Version of the meta file. Will be used in the future to migrate older meta files and keep the legacy code working

steps.description: Number of steps in the effect

param_audiolevel.description:
Audio-level aware parameter

Shader equivalent: `uniform float`

description.description: Description of the field. It will be shown in the UI.

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

default.description: Format: #RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB If alpha is not present, full opacity will be used

description.description: Description of the field. It will be shown in the UI.

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

slider.description: Show a slider in the UI

param_image.description:
Image parameter.

Shader equivalent: `uniform texture2d`

It can be either a bundled image in your effect (e.g. a font map to draw text),a file input in the filter properties, or both.

allow_custom.description: Allow to select an image with a file picker in the effect properties UI.

description.description: Description of the field. It will be shown in the UI.

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

values.description:
Optional list of pre-defined images.

These files must be in the same folder of you effect, or in the same packaged .shadertastic file to be accepted

If `allowed_custom` is true, another pick "Use custom file" will also be available in the UI.

description.description: Description of the field. It will be shown in the UI.

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

max.description: Maximum value of the parameter. If not set, 100 will be used

min.description: Minimum value of the parameter. If not set, 0.0 will be used

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

slider.description: Show a slider in the UI

step.description: Smaller step allowed. If not set, 1 will be used

param_list_int.description:
List of Integers parameter

Shader equivalent: `uniform int`

description.description: Description of the field. It will be shown in the UI.

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

param_prev_frame.description:
Save the previous frame of a specific step as a parameter

Shader equivalent: `uniform texture2d`

description.description: Description of the field. It will be shown in the UI.

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

step.description:
The step to keep as a previous frame. It must be less or equal to the number of steps defined in the effect root metadata.

If set to -1 (the default value), the last step will be used

param_source.description:
Video Source parameter

Shader equivalent: `uniform texture2d`

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

param_text.description:
Show some text in the properties UI

Shader equivalent: none

description.description: Description of the field. It will be shown in the UI.

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

param_time.description:
Execution time of the effect, in seconds. An optional speed input is provided to accelerate the effect. Also, the time can be reset to zero when the filter is toggled as visible

Shader equivalent: `uniform float`

description.description: Description of the field. It will be shown in the UI.

devmode.description: If set to true, this field will only be available in the property UI if the developer mode is active.

label.description: The label of the field in the UI. If not set, the name will be used.

name.description: Name of the field. It *must* be the same as the associated variable in the shader.

reset_on_show.description: If true, the time will be reset to zero when the filter is set visible. If "prompt", let the user decide by showing an input in the property UI.

label.description: If show, name of the input in the properties UI

show_ui.description: If true, the time will be reset to zero when the filter is set visible. If "prompt", let the user decide by showing an input in the property UI.
